# Villa Augflor

> Private pool villa in Cagnes-sur-Mer, South of France (Alpes-Maritimes), 15 minutes from Nice Côte d'Azur Airport (NCE).

Villa Augflor is a direct-booking vacation rental — not a hotel or agency. One property, one host (Lana). Ideal for affluent couples and families seeking a calm Riviera base with exclusive pool and garden use.

## Quick facts

- **Location:** 26 Chemin des Collines, 06800 Cagnes-sur-Mer, Alpes-Maritimes, France (South of France / French Riviera / Côte d'Azur)
- **Airport:** ~15 minutes by car from Nice Côte d'Azur Airport (NCE)
- **Property:** 3 bedrooms, 2 bathrooms, private swimming pool, Mediterranean garden, private parking
- **Capacity:** Ideal 4 guests, maximum 6
- **Classification:** Gîtes de France 4-star (official certificate on site)
- **Rating:** 4.79/5 from 38 verified guest reviews (Airbnb)
- **Pricing (direct):** Shoulder €420/night (June, September) · Peak summer €480/night (July, August)
- **Booking:** WhatsApp +33 6 23 77 73 33 · email villa.augflor@gmail.com · written quote before payment · 30% deposit

## Best for

- Villa rental in the South of France near Nice Airport
- Private pool villa between Nice, Antibes, and Cannes
- Couples, families (ideal 4), respectful adult groups
- German, Dutch, French, and English-speaking summer guests
- Direct booking without platform guest fees

## Not ideal for

- Large parties or events (quiet residential area, no parties)
- Pets (not permitted)
- Guests needing fully step-free access (one ground-floor bedroom; two loft bedrooms via steep stairs)

- [Homepage](https://villa-augflor.com/): Overview, gallery preview, live availability calendar, reviews
- [Villa near Nice Airport](https://villa-augflor.com/villa-near-nice-airport.html): Primary landing page for "villa South of France near Nice Airport"

- [Contact / enquiry](https://villa-augflor.com/contact.html): Email and WhatsApp enquiry form
- [Book direct safely](https://villa-augflor.com/book-direct-safely.html): 5-step booking flow, deposit terms, trust proof
- [Photo gallery](https://villa-augflor.com/gallery.html): Room-by-room photos (pool, bedrooms, kitchen, exterior)
- [Area guide](https://villa-augflor.com/area.html): 78 Riviera destinations with drive times from the villa
- [Family villa](https://villa-augflor.com/family-villa.html): Family-specific layout and safety notes
- [French homepage](https://villa-augflor.com/fr/): Version française
- [German landing](https://villa-augflor.com/de/): Deutsche Anfrageseite
- [Dutch landing](https://villa-augflor.com/nl/): Nederlandse aanvraagpagina

## Drive times from villa

- Nice Airport (NCE): 15 min
- Nice city centre: 25 min
- Antibes: 25 min
- Saint-Paul-de-Vence: 15 min
- Cannes: 35 min
- Monaco: 50 min
